entry.title: VIDA Pot – Elements (Water · Wind · Fire) – 3D Printed Decoration
entry.summary:
Vendor: MAKER-MUR
Type: Home Decor
Price: 19.90

Decorative pot from the VIDA collection, individually manufactured using 3D printing in our workshop in Spain. Each piece is printed separately, checked before shipping, and features a clean finish with careful details. This model is not mass-produced and cannot be found with this configuration and characteristics in conventional stores.


🌱 Shipping with plant and seeds
Spain: Includes real plant and seeds (optional, indicate in order notes).
International: Due to phytosanitary regulations, shipments outside of Spain do not include plants or seeds. Includes a small 3D-printed decorative plant which, although it does not replace the beauty of a real plant, makes the product look just as good. The product is exactly the same; only the live contents of the package change.

📌 Check MAKER-MUR's phytosanitary policy


⚠️ Note: The included plant—real or decorative—is an exclusive complement to the VIDA collection and cannot be exchanged for any other product or monetary compensation.

entry.title: 🐝 Minecraft Bee Card – 3D Printed
entry.summary:
Vendor: MAKER-MUR
Type: Decorative card
Price: 2.49

Collectible Minecraft bee card, individually 3D printed in our workshop in Spain. Each piece is printed separately and checked before shipping. Clean finish with careful details.

entry.title: 🛴 Mudguard Scooter Ducati Pro Evo 1
entry.summary:
Vendor: MAKER-MUR
Type: Technical accessory
Price: 10.00

Ducati Pro Evo 1 Scooter Mudguard

3D printed replacement mudguard individually manufactured for the Ducati Pro Evo 1 electric scooter. A practical and durable solution made to order.

  • Made specifically for the Ducati Pro Evo 1
  • Material: PETG — resistant, durable and high quality
  • Precision 3D printed
  • Made to order part

Do you need any modifications or specific measurements? Contact us and we will custom-make it for you.

📸 Real product images. The final result may have slight variations from the photographs due to the 3D printing process.

entry.title: 🔧 Bambu Lab AMS1 Adapter
entry.summary:
Vendor: MAKER-MUR
Type: Technical accessory
Price: 20.00

Bambu Lab AMS1 Adapter

3D printed adapter individually manufactured for the Bambu Lab AMS1 system. A practical and functional solution to optimize your 3D printer.

  • Specifically made for Bambu Lab AMS1
  • Material: PETG — resistant, durable, and high quality
  • Precision 3D printed
  • Practical and functional solution
  • Made to order

Do you need a specific size or configuration? Contact us and we'll custom-make it for you.

📸 Real product images. The final result may have slight variations from the photos due to the 3D printing process.

entry.title: 🐉 Flexible Dragon
entry.summary:
Vendor: MAKER-MUR
Type: Toy
Price: 2.99

Flexible Dragon

A 3D-printed articulated dragon with flexible parts that allow it to be moved and positioned as desired. A figure with a detailed finish and refined aesthetics, ideal for collectors and dragon lovers.

  • 3D printed with precise finish on every scale

  • Articulated and flexible, can be moved and posed

  • Individually manufactured using 3D printing

  • Ideal for collectors and fantasy lovers

📸 Actual product images. The final result may show slight variations from the photographs due to the artisanal 3D printing process.

entry.title: 🕯️ Nativity Scene with Light
entry.summary:
Vendor: MAKER-MUR
Type: Christmas decoration
Price: 24.99

🕯️ Nativity Scene with Light — 3D Printed Christmas Decoration

Bring magic to your Christmas with this 3D printed nativity scene, individually crafted at MAKER-MUR. A piece that combines tradition and technology to light up your holidays.

  • Material: High-quality PLA — lightweight, durable, and sustainable
  • Multi-color LED lighting with remote control included
  • Power supply included — ready to plug in and enjoy
  • 1.5m cable for greater placement convenience
  • Voltage: DC 5V / Power: 3W — low consumption
  • Made to order in Spain

The final result may show slight variations from the photographs due to the 3D printing process.

📦 Includes: 3D printed nativity scene + multi-color LED light kit + remote control + power supply.

entry.title: 🏠 Home
entry.summary:
Vendor: MAKER-MUR
Type: Christmas decoration
Price: 9.90

🏠 3D Printed Christmas Nativity Scene

Add a magical touch to your Christmas decor with this 3D printed nativity scene, individually crafted at MAKER-MUR. Perfect for complementing your existing nativity set or as a standalone decorative piece.

  • Material: High-quality PLA — lightweight and durable
  • Compatible with LED tea lights to create a warm and cozy atmosphere (not included)
  • 3D printed with detailed finish and great attention to detail
  • Made to order in Spain
  • Easy to place in any space in your home

LED tea lights are not included. The final result may show slight variations from the photographs due to the 3D printing process.

entry.title: ⭐ Bethlehem
entry.summary:
Vendor: MAKER-MUR
Type: Christmas decoration
Price: 9.90

⭐ 3D Printed Christmas Nativity Scene

Decorate your home this Christmas with this 3D printed nativity scene, individually made at MAKER-MUR. A piece that brings the magic of the nativity to your table or mantelpiece.

  • Material: High-quality PLA — lightweight and resistant
  • Compatible with LED tea lights for warm and cozy illumination (not included)
  • 3D printing with detailed finish and precision in each piece
  • Made to order in Spain
  • Lightweight and easy to place in any space

LED tea lights are not included. The final result may show slight variations from the photographs due to the 3D printing process.

Type: Keychain
Price: 2.49

Heart Bricks Keychain

A cool keychain in the shape of a building brick-style heart, the perfect combination of love and the brick world. Ideal for brick fans and the perfect gift for lovers.

  • 3D printed with a brick-style finish in the shape of a heart
  • Symbol of love with a geeky touch
  • Lightweight and durable
  • Perfect as a gift for lovers and brick fans

entry.title: 🤖 Starscream Transformers G1
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hasbro
Type: Collectible figure
Price: 49.99

Starscream — Transformers Generation 1

The treacherous and ambitious Decepticon Starscream joins your collection. This iconic character from the first generation of Transformers is a benchmark for fans of the classic saga.

  • Generation 1 Figure
  • Finish true to the animated series character, with great precision in every detail
  • Articulated, not transformable
  • Ideal for collectors and Transformers fans
  • Starscream Measurements: 18 cm high x 17 cm wide

🎁 Includes Laserbeak Transformers G1 as a gift!

  • Transformable
  • Laserbeak Measurements (cassette mode): 3.93 cm x 5.83 cm x 1.03 cm
  • Laserbeak Measurements (bird mode, transformed): 3.93 cm x 5.83 cm x 1.03 cm

🔜 New batch and new characters coming soon!

📸 Actual product images. The final result may show slight variations from the photographs due to the 3D printing process.

entry.title: 💧 LIFE - Water is Born
entry.summary:
Vendor: MAKER-MUR
Type: Home Decor
Price: 19.99

💧 LIFE - Water is Born — The fluidity of water in your home. Complete pack of 3D printed pots by MAKER-MUR, inspired by the element of water.

  • 🪴 1 large pot
  • 🪴 1 central bowl
  • 🪴 2 small pots for germinating grass
  • 🟦 1 base tray
  • 🌿 1 plant of choice: cactus or succulent
  • 🌍 Soil
  • 🌾 Grass seeds

📐 Central pot measurements — Diameter: 53 mm · Height: 59 mm · Depth: 52 mm

📐 Base tray measurements — Length: 260 mm · Width: 90 mm · Height: 10 mm

📐 Germinator measurements (x2) — Diameter: 35 mm · Height: 28 mm · Depth: 26 mm

📸 Actual product images. The final result may show slight variations from the photographs due to the artisanal 3D printing process.


⚠️ 📦 🌱 Includes a real plant. May be affected by transport. See refund policy
